name: Liquid Transition
title: Liquid Transition
description: A full-screen scroll- and swipe-driven page transition: a liquid S-curve wave curtain sweeps across the screen, swaps the content behind the cover, then peels away to reveal the next screen. Directional per step, boundary-locked (no looping), wheel and touch driven. Dependency-free.
